rationale_top3:
Families come back to BIG4 Gold Coast year after year. Kids refuse to leave, parents actually relax, and the heated waterpark rivals anything on the Gold Coast. A resort pool, jumping pillow, flying fox, daily activity program and the Nibbles Café with poolside ordering round out the on-site experience. Movie World is a 3-minute drive from the front gate.

One thing to know: request sites toward the riverside or interior of the park to avoid highway noise on the M1 side.
rationale_honourable: Well-landscaped grounds balancing resort amenities with green spaces. Close to all major Gold Coast theme parks while maintaining a peaceful retreat atmosphere. Comprehensive dog facilities including daycare, wash stations, and off-leash areas.
water_fun: Heated waterpark with multiple slides, resort pool
kids_play: Jumping pillow, playground, flying fox, daily activities
pet_detail: Dog-friendly with onsite doggy daycare, dog wash facilities, large off-leash dog park, and dogs welcome at Nibbles Café
best_for: Families who want a resort-style experience with serious in-park entertainment. If keeping the kids happy without leaving the gate is the priority, this is your park.

rationale_top3:
Broadwater sits right on the water with waterfront sites, direct beach access and a genuine community feel. Free pancake breakfasts and daily swans keep families coming back for decades. Two heated pools, a jumping pillow, playground and a packed activity program including outdoor movies and kids disco nights keep everyone busy. The light rail connects you to the rest of the coast.

One thing to know: ask for waterfront or park-facing sites. No WiFi on site.
rationale_honourable: Direct Broadwater beach access and waterfront positioning. Good value considering the extensive facilities and entertainment program included.
water_fun: Two heated pools, direct Broadwater beach access
kids_play: Huge jumping pillow, playground, games room activities
best_for: Families who want a genuine waterfront setting with a relaxed, community feel. The beach access and proximity to theme parks make it a great all-rounder.

park_name: NRMA Treasure Island Holiday Resort, Gold Coast
rationale_top3:
Treasure Island packs in multiple pools, water slides, a splash pad, jumping pillow and mini golf, with Dreamworld next door and Movie World minutes away. Facilities are well-maintained and consistently reliable.

One thing to know: sites run smaller than BIG4 and the park gets busy in school holidays. Book early for peak periods.
rationale_honourable: Good value given the extensive onsite facilities, quality bistro dining, and walking distance to major shopping and attractions despite compact site sizing.
water_fun: Multiple pools, water slides, splash pad fun
kids_play: Jumping pillow, wreck room activities, mini golf
pet_detail: Pet friendly with designated dog park area; some accommodation restrictions apply
best_for: Families who want to be in the thick of it — activity-packed, well-located and the perfect base for a big Gold Coast itinerary.

rationale_top3: Exceptional waterfront location directly on Tallebudgera Creek with safe swimming areas and short walk to beach access. Outstanding family entertainment facilities including heated pool with fun slides, adults-only pool, and diverse water activity options. High cleanliness standards and positive guest sentiment with friendly staff and well-maintained amenities.
rationale_honourable: Convenient proximity to Burleigh Heads and Gold Coast attractions. Good site sizing for family camping needs. Reasonable value proposition with on-site food truck and holiday activities.
water_fun: Heated pool, waterslides, creek swimming, beach access
kids_play: Playground, pool slides, trike hire, holiday activities
pet_detail: Not pet friendly - no dogs allowed
best_for: Families who prioritise location and water activities over modern amenities

kids_play: Jumping pillow, small playground, open green spaces
pet_detail: Dogs welcome with complimentary dog wash token on arrival; dogs must be on leash; vaccination certificates required
best_for: Families with pets who want a beachside location and relaxed atmosphere over heavy on-site entertainment

water_fun: No pool, patrolled beach directly across the road
best_for: Families with young children who value a safe beachfront location with exceptional hosts over traditional park infrastructure

pet_detail: No dogs allowed - smoke-free and pet-free park
best_for: Families who prioritise beach access and a clean, peaceful environment over on-site entertainment

water_fun: No pool, beach directly across the road
best_for: Families who want to be steps from the sand with easy access to cafes, shops and coastal walks

kids_play: Ninja playground, play areas, occasional activities
best_for: Budget-conscious families who want affordable Gold Coast accommodation with pool fun and easy beach access

water_fun: Netted swimming area in river nearby
kids_play: No dedicated playground mentioned in reviews
pet_detail: Dogs allowed, off-leash area available, dog treats provided, pets welcome in some villas and sites
best_for: Boating and fishing enthusiast families seeking short-term waterfront access who prioritise location over on-site entertainment and can manage insect challenges.
